name: current_run
short_description: Set or get the current run
full_help:
current_run

Description: 
Set or get the current run

Syntax: 
current_run  [-synthesis] [-implementation] [-quiet] [-verbose] [<run>]

Returns: 
run object

Usage: 
  Name               Description
  ------------------------------
  [-synthesis]       Set or get the current synthesis run
  [-implementation]  Set or get the current implementation run (default 
                     unless '-synthesis' is specified)
  [-quiet]           Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]         Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<run>]            Run to set as current; optional

Categories: 
Project
